name: parle-claude-desktop-extension
description: Claude Desktop extension for Parle room tools through a bundled local MCP server

parle_api_base.title: Parle API base
parle_api_base.description: Parle API base URL. Keep the default unless using an approved local development setup.

parle_room_id.title: Parle room id
parle_room_id.description: Room id from the Parle room settings or setup flow. V1 requires a room id rather than a room handle.

parle_agent_token.title: Parle agent token
parle_agent_token.description: Agent-scoped Parle room token. Claude Desktop should store this sensitive value securely.
